environment.description: Optional. Specify the environment name. This will be useful in data links

hostname.description: Customize the api URL. By default this will be https://api.honeycomb.io

retentionLimit.description: Optional. The maximum time window, in days. Queries will only return data from the last N days, where N is the retention limit. Default is 7 days, since that is the maximum retention limit normally supported by the Honeycomb API. Honeycomb API docs: https://api-docs.honeycomb.io/api/query-data

team.description: Specify the team name. This will be useful in data links
